data.title: Zcash Foundation Expands DNS Seed Nodes to Enhance Network Reliability
data.description:
According to Odaily, the Zcash Foundation has announced the deployment of five new DNS seed nodes in response to the Electric Coin Company's (ECC) decision to cease operations of its DNS seed nodes on January 8. These new nodes are located in South Carolina and Oregon in the United States, as well as in Belgium, Germany, and Finland in Europe.

With the addition of these nodes, the total number of DNS seed nodes operated by the Zcash Foundation has reached six. This expansion aims to ensure reliable node discovery for users and improve the startup performance of wallets and nodes. Furthermore, the Zcash Foundation is considering further deployments in other regions to enhance coverage and reliability. Shielded Labs is also working on deploying additional seed nodes.

data.title: The U.S. Senate Banking Committee clarifies seven misconceptions about the Clarity Act: it does not deviate from securities laws and emphasizes the boundaries of investor protection and regulation.
data.description: The U.S. Senate Banking Committee published an article interpreting and clarifying seven misconceptions about the Clarity Act, including: 1. It does not deviate from existing securities laws but is based on mature securities law principles, clearly defining which digital assets are securities and which are commodities. 2. The act is essentially an investor protection bill, aiming to prevent a repeat of FTX-style risk events by clearly defining rules to combat fraud, manipulation, and abuse. 3. By clearly defining the regulatory authority of the SEC and CFTC and establishing a joint advisory committee to coordinate rules, it fills regulatory gaps and introduces targeted anti-circumvention provisions to reduce arbitrage opportunities. 4. It requires key intermediaries to fulfill anti-money laundering and counter-terrorism financing obligations and strengthens sanctions compliance and the Treasury Department's enforcement authority. 5. It does not allow DeFi to become a channel for illicit funds, emphasizing "precise targeting of illicit activities," requiring centralized intermediaries interacting with DeFi protocols to implement risk management standards, and developing specific rules for intermediaries that are not truly decentralized to protect the code and innovation itself. 6. Clearly protect the self-management rights of software developers and users, and do not regard developers who do not control user funds but only release or maintain code as financial intermediaries, while retaining the regulatory authorities' ability to intervene in real risks. 7. The core objective is to strengthen national security, protect investors, and promote compliant innovation under clear rules, rather than "tailor-made" for specific industries.

data.title: Fintech infrastructure provider Alpaca raises $150 million, led by Drive Capital.
data.description: Fintech infrastructure provider Alpaca announced the completion of a $150 million Series D funding round, valuing the company at $1.15 billion. The round was led by Drive Capital, with participation from Citadel Securities, cryptocurrency exchange Kraken, and the venture capital arm of BNP Paribas. As part of the funding, Alpaca also secured a $40 million line of credit. Alpaca's software makes it easier to offer trading services for stocks, ETFs, cryptocurrencies, and other financial instruments. Co-founder and CEO Yoshi Yokokawa stated that as the lines between traditional finance and the crypto space blur and platforms are consolidating their services, Alpaca's annual recurring revenue has exceeded $100 million. (Fortune)

data.title: Pyramid schemes posing as crypto brokers defraud Russians of 1 billion rubles on average
data.description:
Russian organizers of financial pyramid schemes are now often pretending to be brokers offering victims to earn money on investments in crypto and traditional assets. Sberbank, Russia’s largest banking institution, has warned about the new trend and estimated that each reported scheme costs unsuspecting citizens up to a billion Russian rubles on average. Fraudsters pose […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/pyramid-crypto-brokers-defraud-russians/

data.title: MANTRA Announces Restructuring Amid Challenging Year
data.description: According to Foresight News, MANTRA CEO JP Mullin announced on social media that the company will undergo restructuring following a difficult year, which includes reducing team size. The layoffs will affect several departments, including business development, marketing, and human resources. Mullin stated that a series of extremely unfortunate and unfair events in April 2025, coupled with ongoing market downturns, increasing competition, and evolving market dynamics, have made MANTRA's cost structure unsustainable in light of recent circumstances. The restructuring aims to enhance capital efficiency and focus more on core business operations.

data.title: Bernstein: Maintains Buy rating on Strategy with a price target of $450.
data.description: BitcoinTreasuries.NET published an article on the X platform stating that Bernstein, an asset management company with $850 billion in assets under management, reiterated its buy rating on Strategy (MSTR), a company that holds BTC as a reserve asset, and set a target price of $450.

data.title: Bitcoin cools from $96.5K high as analysis says US tariff ruling 'priced in'
data.description:
Bitcoin cemented a run to yearly BTC price highs despite the potential for volatility involving Iran, the Fed, and the US Supreme Court making trade tariffs illegal.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-rests-96-5k-high-analysis-us-tariff-ruling-priced-in?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 3,300 USDT with a Narrowed 5.18% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 14, 2026, 11:11 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 3,300 USDT and is now trading at 3,299.780029 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 5.18% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: The Bitwise spot Chainlink ETF will begin trading on the New York Stock Exchange Arca on January 15.
data.description: Following regulatory approval, Bitwise's spot Chainlink ETF (CLNK) will begin trading on the New York Stock Exchange's Arca exchange on January 15. (Solid Intel)

data.title: 99% of Crypto-Allocating Advisors Plan to Hold or Increase Exposure in 2026
data.description:
Financial advisors who already allocate to crypto show near-universal confidence heading into 2026, according to Bitwise’s latest survey. The data highlights a sharp contrast between advisors with direct crypto experience and those who remain on the sidelines.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/99-of-crypto-allocating-advisors-plan-to-hold-or-increase-exposure-in-2026/

data.title: Bitwise's Chainlink Spot ETF to Begin Trading on January 15
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bitwise has received approval for its Chainlink spot ETF, known as CLNK, which is set to commence trading on the New York Stock Exchange Arca platform on January 15.

data.title: Google Seeks Dismissal of Antitrust Lawsuit Over AI Search Summaries
data.description: According to PANews, Google has filed a motion with the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia to dismiss an antitrust lawsuit brought by Penske Media regarding its AI search summaries. Google argues that AI Overviews are a legitimate product enhancement and that media outlets have the option to opt out of being indexed, thus not constituting a coercive action. This marks Google's third attempt to have the case dismissed. If the motion is denied, the lawsuit may proceed to a broader antitrust examination concerning AI and platform power.

data.title: Crypto Trader Huang Licheng Closes ZEC Position and Opens New Leverage Trades
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, on January 14, crypto trader Huang Licheng, also known as 'Brother Ma Ji,' closed a ZEC long position, securing a profit of $6,256. Following this, he opened new leveraged positions, including a 25x leverage long position on 9,000 ETH, with a current unrealized profit of $1.376 million, and a 10x leverage long position on 269,000 HYPE, with an unrealized profit of $107,000.

data.title: Metaplanet's Stock Surges Over 14% in Japan
data.description: According to Odaily, Metaplanet, a publicly listed Bitcoin treasury company in Japan, saw its stock price increase by more than 14% today, currently trading at 605 yen.

data.title: Bitcoin OG Whales Show Decreased Activity Amid Market Changes
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on January 14, CryptoQuant analyst Darkfost noted a significant decline in the on-chain activity of Bitcoin OG whales, who are holders that have not moved their coins for over five years. During this cycle, the activity of these OG whales was unusually high, with the number of UTXOs spent surpassing levels from the previous cycle.

It is also noteworthy that this cycle provided Bitcoin OG whales with an almost perfect selling window, as large institutional funds and even government-level buyers entered the market. As the cycle progressed, the selling behavior of Bitcoin OG whales at periodic highs has been steadily decreasing.

The 90-day moving average of the most recent STXO peak was approximately 2,300 BTC, but this average has since dropped significantly, currently fluctuating around 1,000 BTC. This indicates that the selling pace of Bitcoin OG whales has also slowed down. The impactful selling pressure is noticeably decreasing, with the current dominant trend leaning more towards holding rather than distributing (selling).

data.title: Vitalik Buterin: Ethereum has achieved the original Web3 vision
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin believes Ethereum has the full Web3 tech stack that was envisioned back in 2014, with a mix of L1 features and side projects.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/vitalik-buterin-ethereum-web3-vision/

data.title: Ripple Secures Preliminary EMI Approval in Luxembourg, Strengthening EU Expansion
data.description:
Ripple announced that it has received preliminary approval for an Electronic Money Institution (EMI) license from Luxembourg’s financial regulator, the Commission de Surveillance du Secteur Financier (CSSF). The development marks a key regulatory milestone in Ripple’s plan to build institutional-grade digital asset infrastructure across Europe and scale Ripple Payments throughout the European Union.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ripple-secures-preliminary-emi-approval-in-luxembourg-strengthening-eu-expansion/

data.title: A whale deposited 2,015 ETH into HTX after a three-month hiatus, incurring a loss of $2.04 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0x6F3...31Bc) deposited 2015 ETH, worth $6.67 million, into HTX after being dormant for three months. This whale initially withdrew the ETH for $8.73 million, resulting in a loss of $2.04 million from this transaction.

data.title: Over $130 billion flows into crypto market in 24 hours
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market added more than $130 billion in value over the past 24 hours, reflecting a renewed inflow of capital into digital assets. As of press time, total crypto market capitalization stood at $3.24 trillion, up from $3.11 trillion a day earlier, a net increase of roughly $130 billion
source: https://finbold.com/over-130-billion-flows-into-crypto-market-in-24-hours/
